signals.reasoning: BTC is already in a liquidation-flush state, so I would not chase a fresh short after the initial dump.
ETH is also already flushing and does not offer a clean new edge in either direction right here.
SOL is already in flush territory, so I would rather wait for a clearer reset than force a late trade.
0G has extreme squeeze fuel from deeply negative funding, but the move is already too extended and the active veto blocks forcing a fresh long.
ZEREBRO is already in a flush state and too illiquid to trust for a serious fresh short chase.
RESOLV has upside momentum, but liquidity is too poor and the active veto blocks forcing a fresh long.
DASH is already down hard and I would rather wait than chase a fresh short here.
CHILLGUY is too mixed and too low-liquidity to justify a serious fresh directional trade.
BLUR has some squeeze fuel but the signal is not strong enough and liquidity is still too poor to force a long here.
STBL is already deeply flushed and I would rather wait than chase a fresh short here.
LIT is already down hard and I would rather wait than chase a fresh short here.
